public_helper_change_requires: stage3 gate index visible in CI logs

required_gates.name: public_helper_full_regression
required_gates.purpose: Full regression guard for decoder, executor, dispatch, memory, flags, and shared helpers.

required_gates.name: generated_long_fuzz
required_gates.purpose: Higher seed count generated true-CPU differential fuzz for changed instruction families.

required_gates.name: undefined_flags
required_gates.purpose: Ensure tests compare only architecturally defined RFLAGS bits.
required_review: Every new ProgramSpec must set flag_mask deliberately.
Undefined flags must not be added to comparison masks.

required_gates.name: exception_priority
required_gates.purpose: Preserve exception ordering, rollback, split-access, canonical-address, and invalid-encoding cases.
required_review: New model-only or unsafe-native behavior must have explicit manual or controlled-environment coverage.

required_gates.name: memory_access_order
required_gates.purpose: Guard guest memory ordering, RMW writeback, string operations, and split access behavior.

required_gates.name: simd_state_boundary
required_gates.purpose: Track current SIMD/x87/K state coverage boundary and avoid over-claiming full register-file comparison.
required_review: SIMD results that are not directly register-compared must be stored into the data area or explicitly documented.
Full YMM/ZMM/K/x87 register-file comparison remains future work.

required_gates.name: hardware_feature_matrix
required_gates.purpose: Preserve the feature matrix that determines which generated tests are selected.
